description: Interesting scenario: fusion=weighted across three heterogeneous stores (vector, graph, keyword), with a custom filter narrowing by project tag. Demonstrates cross-store fusion where each backend contributes a differently-shaped signal.

request.query: open questions about the memory router fusion algorithm

results.content: RRF k=60 is the AMP default; per-store weights only apply when fusion=weighted.
On 2026-04-12 the team agreed weighted fusion needed per-store config before v1.

notes: Under weighted fusion, scores are not normalized to RRF magnitudes — they are the sum of per-store weight × per-store raw score. Per-store weights are configured on the router (out-of-band of this request). filter is opaque to AMP and forwarded to each backend; backends that do not understand a filter key MAY ignore it.
